retry_reason: kref_put always succeeds in decrementing the refcount; there is no failure mode that could be retried.
contract_summary: __rxe_put is a put-wrapper that releases one reference to a pool element (rxe_pool_elem). It calls kref_put on the element's ref_cnt, and if the reference count reaches zero, the element is freed via the rxe_elem_release callback. After calling this function, the caller must not access the element object, as it may have been deallocated. The return value indicates whether the element was actually freed (non-zero) or not (zero), but checking this return is optional for correctness of the reference count.
